/usr/bin/c++ -D_GLIBCXX_ASSERTIONS -g -rdynamic CMakeFiles/RCompiler.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RCompiler.dir/src/parser/Parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RCompiler.dir/src/parser/ParseItem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RCompiler.dir/src/parser/ParsePattern.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RCompiler.dir/src/parser/ParsePath.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RCompiler.dir/src/parser/ParseStmt.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RCompiler.dir/src/parser/ParseType.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RCompiler.dir/src/parser/PrattParser.cpp.o -o RCompiler
